data.name: Brothel Tycoon 2
data.detailed_description:
Brothel Tycoon 2 is a simulation game where you are in the role of Yvonne, a young entrepreneur who wants to turn a small cafe into a luxurious place for adult entertainment.

EMPLOYEES

After Yvonne buys the cafe, it is necessary to find employees. This part starts with choosing the assistant (which is a kind of game AI) and after that you need to choose the waitresses for the cafe.

During the game, when conditions are met, Yvonne can expand her business by hiring female dancers and opening a dance club.


Further development of the business enables the employment of additional employees such as security guards, nurses, hookers and maids.

MANAGEMENT


During the game, it is possible to determine working days and shifts for employees, hire new ones and give notice to existing ones.

In addition, the basic task is to determine the prices of the services offered by the facility (in the range from -50 to +50% of the base prices).

GAME ENGINE


This game is a full 3D business simulation made in the Unity engine in 3rd person view.

GAMEPLAY AND SEXUAL EVENTS


The entire facility operates 24/7, and it is up to the player to organize the employees' work schedules, order supplies, and monitor the operation of the entire facility. The game has no breaks and the entire plot, including the sex scenes, takes place in parallel with the operation of the facility.

It is possible to see the waitresses while they serve the guests, but it is also possible to see how the nurses conduct a medical examination or what they do in their free time.


As a bonus, Yvonne has an additional option, which is not to pay the bills with money (see picture below)...

data.short_description: Brothel Tycoon 2 is a simulation game where you are in the role of Yvonne, a young entrepreneur who wants to turn a small cafe into a luxurious place for adult entertainment.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Intel Pentium G4500, AMD FX8350 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X 11 GPU w/ 4GB Available Video Memory
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 16 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Intel i5 6500, AMD Ryzen 3-1200 or above
  • 記憶體: 32 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 3060 8GB, AMD RX570 or above
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 32 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 16 GB 可用空間

  • DirectX: Version 11

  • Memory: 32 GB RAM
